highlights: 6-phase flow defined only in bin/stampede.sh (protocol+prompt); not in SKILL.md, worker agent, or merger agent.
Monitor lists 5 ledgers; no adopt visibility.
Merger has no explicit adoption/collab handling.

evidence.note: metaswarm launch only; no phase text.
Bundle Shape lacks adoption/source_refs fields; consensus block at 254-257 only.

gaps: Phases are advisory; nothing prevents skipping.
No requirement that broadcast references consensus item_id.
No adoptions.jsonl ledger; adoption is not append-only auditable.
Merger does not validate adoption decisions during synthesis.
recommendations: Add adoptions.jsonl + monitor count + protocol entry.
Define machine-checkable transition rules: required predecessor IDs, min reviews, optional timeouts.
Require broadcasts to reference consensus item_id; adoptions to reference broadcast_id+consensus item_id.
Validate phase order in commander bundle generation and merger synthesis.
Have merger read and report adopted consensus + source_refs explicitly.
